headline: Senior Backend Engineer @ Finlynk | Ex-Razorpay | Distributed Payments Systems
summary: Backend engineer with 9 years building payments infrastructure. Leads the payments team at Finlynk, previously built the core payouts engine at Razorpay. Focused on correctness, ledger integrity, and distributed-systems reliability over cleverness.

experience.title: Senior Backend Engineer
experience.description: Leads the payments infrastructure team (6 engineers). Redesigned the ledger and reconciliation pipeline (Kafka + Postgres, exactly-once semantics), cutting settlement mismatches by 94% and audit close time from 5 days to 6 hours.

experience.title: Backend Engineer
experience.description: Built and scaled the payouts engine handling ~2M transactions/day. Migrated a monolith payout service to an event-driven architecture on Kafka. Mentored 4 junior engineers.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Worked on billing systems for the CRM product.

education.school: National Institute of Technology Karnataka (NITK), Surathkal

capabilities: Can lead incident response for payments outages
Can mentor engineers on distributed systems fundamentals
relevance_summary: Priya is the person to talk to when a payments or ledger system needs to be provably correct, not just fast. She's led two major reconciliation rewrites and is strong on Kafka-based exactly-once processing. Worth reaching out for backend architecture reviews on anything involving money movement, or for on-call/incident-response process design in a fintech context.

connection_notes.text: Met at the Bengaluru FinTech builders meetup, Feb 2026.
